name: saturn-particles
description: Saturn ring particle system with gesture control

scripts.copy-mediapipe: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='node_modules/@mediapipe/hands';const dst='public/mediapipe/hands';fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(src).filter(f=>/\.(js|wasm|data|binarypb|tflite)$/.test(f)).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(src+'/'+f,dst+'/'+f));console.log('MediaPipe files copied to '+dst)"
